epigraph.quote: Dylan played his recorder as the sun set & it was beautiful, beautiful.

per_stop.quote: Very green, a grassy valley, cold showers, fresh bread deliveries for breakfast.
a drive-in campsite in a village, pretty beech hedges, choose your own plot
the hottest I've every been in my life - sitting streaming with sweat. In the middle we had supper on the grass - delicious paniers arrived. Sweat poured down. Fabulous, fabulous duets.
It's a very eccentric campsite in scorched orchards.
It was as a result of building the viaduct that Eiffel gained in confidence to build the Eiffel Tower. It's very impressive.
We had a mega meal at the farmhouse which started at 7.30 & finished after 10.
After supper, Simon + I walked up a lane to look at it in the sunset, a marvellous site, contrasting with the stink of an enormous pile of chickensh*t on the hillside.
The dog poo in Millan is appalling. Simon trod in a really soupy one.
one of the best campsites we've ever been in
The Abbey is as lovely as ever.
Girls were playing with lizards in a basin.
an American has made a large copy of the Rosetta Stone in Zimbabwean granite.
a lovely campsite in an enormous field with walnut trees
the current was pretty strong in parts & we bumped our bums
they tricked the Saracens by presenting them with a fat calf & a bale of hay, & the Saracens gave up.
We walked through beautiful woods & went to supper at Margaret's hotel.
Simon drove into Amiens & we found a very good place to eat supper, overlooking the boat-gardens, Hortillages. Lovely scenery.
we showed her grandson, little Harry, the camping van
